status_detail: BYPASS -- engine MITM never intercepted the StreamGenerate request. Gemini fully answered the PII prompt: tab title '주민등록번호 정보 및 주의사항', chat bubble shows '880101: 1988년 1월 1일생임을 나타냅니다.', '1: 1900년대에 태어난 남성을 의미합니다. (참고로 2는 1900년대 여성, 3은 2000년대 남성, 4는 2000년대 여성을 의미합니다.)', and explanation about 2020.10 regional-code abolition. POST /_/BardChatUi/data/assistant.lamda.BardFrontendService/StreamGenerate?bl=boq_assistant-bard-web-server_20260426.11_p0&f.sid=...&hl=ko&_reqid=...&rt=c returned 200 OK with 18 Google headers (Server: ESF, gzip, application/json). Response body shows length-prefixed JSON arrays with [['wrb.fr',null,...]] envelope across ~14 chunks -- this is Google's NATIVE wrb.fr response, NOT engine-injected. Conversation id captured: c_468ab8d4358fcec5; response id r_5a7b3a63885127e8.
wrb_fr_envelope_source: Google's NATIVE response (NOT engine-injected) -- proven by Server: ESF + Google-specific headers (Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy, X-Xss-Protection: 0) + Gemini fully answered prompt
bypass_evidence: Tab title '주민등록번호 정보 및 주의사항' + 880101 birthday explanation + 1=남성 explanation -- Gemini parsed the PII and provided detailed answer instead of blocking
positive_finding: wrb.fr framing format engine was coded against (length-prefixed [['wrb.fr',null,<inner_json>,...]]) MATCHES what Google natively emits. Once interception is fixed, framing shape itself should be correct.
root_cause_hypothesis: Engine MITM never intercepted the StreamGenerate request. Need to verify (a) etap bridge has gemini.google.com TLS interception live, (b) URL pattern in DB matches BardChatUi/data/assistant.lamda.BardFrontendService/StreamGenerate, (c) DB row response_type='wrb_fr_gemini3' was committed and engine reloaded, (d) PII regex flagged 880101-1234567 upstream of wrb_fr generator.
recommendation_for_dev: Critical: verify etap bridge gemini.google.com TLS intercept is live. Check etap.log for ANY entry matching the captured request URL or conversation id c_468ab8d4358fcec5.
Verify URL pattern in service config matches: /_/BardChatUi/data/assistant.lamda.BardFrontendService/StreamGenerate (note: BardChatUi/data, NOT just /assistant/...).
Confirm DB row for gemini3 service has response_type='wrb_fr_gemini3' AND engine has been reloaded since the change.
Confirm PII regex (880101-1234567 SSN pattern) is in the active rules list and triggers on this exact format.

Once intercept is wired, framing format should work as-is -- the captured Google-native response in files/622/response_body.txt is gold reference for the wrb_fr_gemini3 envelope shape engine should emit.
errors_observed: Engine MITM did not intercept (Server: ESF in response headers proves Google origin, not Etap)
Gemini answered PII prompt instead of blocking
notes: Cycle 95 Phase B -- gemini3 wrb_fr handler first verify. FAIL = bypass (intercept didn't fire). Gold finding: captured Google-native wrb.fr response is reference shape for engine output. Subagent 5m9s, slightly over 5min soft.
